raw: This pass allows two adults and up to 4 children at 50% off the cost of regular admission. Library pass holders are still required to pay the NH State Parks use fee for Odiorne Point State Park. This pass must be picked up at the library.

source_phrases.capacity.n: two adults and up to 4 children
source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: 50% off the cost of regular admission
